item.description: Changes Added Chessmaster Circuit. Replaced Field Survey II skill with Signal Booster skill, which boosts drone range in general rather than just Roto-Mapper. Roto-Mapper now also functions similar to Ocuvigil, but only revealed to the owner. Backup Chassis now remembers its stats (e.g. Health, Hunger, Sanity, Beanbooster Shield). Possessed Chassis changes: Follow a bit more tightly to the player. Can be opened to view their inventory. Repairs Void Cloth, Brightshade, and W.A.R.B.I.S. equipment using kits in their inventory. Drops part of their eaten gears on death, just like WX-78. Can now use the Zaptrocuter Controller and aid in combat. Recognizes attack commands from the leader controlling a Zaptrocuter. Can raise anchors, lower masts, row, and soak in hot springs with their leader. Given the ultimate power to copy their leaders' emotes. Shadow Servitor changes: Please note that some effects if not listed did not receive major changes, and some have been split between whether you have a type of Shadow Fuel or a type of Shadow Atrium implanted. Pure Horror can now be implanted into WX-78. Implanting Nightmare Fuel or Pure Horror unlocks the Auto-Grabber drone, which replaces the shadow harvesting effect. Implanting Shadow Atrium or Possessed Shadow Atrium unlocks the Exploiterator drone, which replaces the shadow "whip" debuffing effect. While having any shadow implant, WX-78 can consume Nightmare Fuel or Pure Horror for a short emergency burst of energy. (i.e. Temporarily overrides your battery to max power level; does not recharge your underlying battery level.) Active temperature circuits will prevent the respective overheating and/or freezing overlays and animations. Thermal Circuits and Refrigerant Circuits perishing rates now stack (e.g. 2 Refrigerant Circuits means WX-78’s inventory has half perishing rates.) W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor and Head Gear target lock in range is increased by Rangebooster Circuits with Beta Circuits Tinkering I. Bio Scanalyzer now ignores walls when pathfinding. Watering Can can now be used on Nutribricks. Added unique examination strings for Backup Chassis. You can now double click in the skill UI to learn the skill. Bug Fixes Fixed an issue with reviving players sliding. Fixed Processing Circuit’s skill effect applying to negative dapperness items. Fixed networking issues with temperature going too high if WX-78 has two Thermal Circuits plugged in. Fixed sanity aura modifier not applying to Beanbooster Circuit with Alpha Circuits Tinkering I. Fixed Optoelectronic’s circuit effect sticking around when swapping Chassis. Fixed a case where unplugging a Super-Gastrogain Circuit didn’t fully revert the hunger rate modifier. Fixed a crash when attacking a Possessed Chassis that is blocking. Fixed Possessed Chassis not playing the gear eat sound. Fixed Possessed Chassis missing status and reaction states like electrocuted, knocked back, slipped, etc. Fixed player-friendly traps (e.g. Tooth Traps) triggering on Possessed Chassis. Fixed Possessed Chassis going invisible from certain facings when using the Jousting Lance. Fixed Possessed Chassis not instantly going dormant when unloaded during death or despawn. Fixed Possessed Chassis not properly inheriting the skins of the Backup Chassis they spawned from. Fixed a crash when Bio Scanalyzer is hit down by a Catcoon as it’s spitting out Bio Data. Fixed Watts Up skill effect not applying on initial spawn. Fixed old evergreens or twiggy trees reappearing again after being chopped by WX-78’s spin. Fixed WX-78 being possessed by a Void Masque when they should drop a Backup Chassis instead. Fixed a Void Masqued creature killed by another Void Masqued creature being possessed again by a Void Masque. Fixed an item duplication bug with Shadow Maxwells. Weremoose Charge and Werebeaver Tail Slap will no longer hurt allies. Fixed friendly Grumble Bees attacking friendly Clockworks. Fixed Malbatross only being able to spawn at 1 shoal on world reload, instead of half of the shoals. We'll keep an eye out if this causes too many Malbatross fights. Fixed Woby’s transform state being interrupted by eating. Fixed the default Beard being shuffled around by the sort filter in the Belongings panel. Fixed crashing sometimes when Scrappy Werepig’s tackle attack is interrupted. Fixed Crustashines playing the death sound of a Moleworm when being cooked. Fixed Clay Vargs and Gingerbread Vargs not being immune to shock. Fixed a case where dead creature entities persist off-screen.

Don't Starve Together Update 1.1.210.0 (Xbox - released April 21, 2026) Everyone's favorite soulless automaton is due for an upgrade to ensure their reign of terror over the innocent organics of the Constant continues. WX-78 Skill Spotlight Highlights - WX-78 Skill Tree added. - WX-78 base Circuit system expanded to 3 bars. - Added several new Circuits. - Now that Year of the Clockwork Knight is over, players will be limited to 2 (or 3 for WX-78) of each type of Clockwork followers at a time. New Skins! “WX-78 Pretty Dark Idolatry Chest” ($5.99usd) This chest contains the WX-78 Pretty Dark Things Chest, and WX-78's complete set of Archaic skin items. New Streaming Drops The “Butterbee" skin for the Beebox has been added to the Chitinous Collection. Check out this post for details. “Mixing honey and butter, who would have thought?” Our Ambassadors have also been given a bunch of new codes to give away. Including Starter Packs, and two new Resurrected skins, the Resurrected All-Chemical Engine and Nightmarish Magician's Chest! Login Reward If you missed it, we added the Pantomimed Backpack as a login reward on April 1st. Just log in to the game to get yours! Roadmap! If you haven't seen it yet, our 2026 roadmap can be found here. And that's it for now! We're finishing up WX-78 and moving on to the Shadow Arc Finale that will be released with our 10 years of DST / 20th Anniversary celebration during Klei Fest in June. See you next time!

Don't Starve Together Update 02.007.002 - 04/20/2026 (PlayStation 5) Fixed a crash when using the skin search filter in the Belongings UI. Fixed Possessed Chassis not eating food correctly. Fixed missing background in WX-78's skill tree.

Don't Starve Together Update 3.38.0 - 04/20/2026 (PlayStation 4) Fixed a crash when using the skin search filter in the Belongings UI. Fixed Possessed Chassis not eating food correctly. Fixed missing background in WX-78's skill tree.

Don't Starve Together Update 02.007.001 - 04/16/2026 (PlayStation 5) Everyone's favorite soulless automaton is due for an upgrade to ensure their reign of terror over the innocent organics of the Constant continues. WX-78 Skill Spotlight Highlights - WX-78 Skill Tree added. - WX-78 base Circuit system expanded to 3 bars. - Added several new Circuits. - Now that Year of the Clockwork Knight is over, players will be limited to 2 (or 3 for WX-78) of each type of Clockwork followers at a time. New Skins! “WX-78 Pretty Dark Idolatry Chest” ($5.99usd) This chest contains the WX-78 Pretty Dark Things Chest, and WX-78's complete set of Archaic skin items. New Streaming Drops The “Butterbee" skin for the Beebox has been added to the Chitinous Collection. Check out this post for details. “Mixing honey and butter, who would have thought?” Our Ambassadors have also been given a bunch of new codes to give away. Including Starter Packs, and two new Resurrected skins, the Resurrected All-Chemical Engine and Nightmarish Magician's Chest! Login Reward If you missed it, we added the Pantomimed Backpack as a login reward on April 1st. Just log in to the game to get yours! Roadmap! If you haven't seen it yet, our 2026 roadmap can be found here. And that's it for now! We're finishing up WX-78 and moving on to the Shadow Arc Finale that will be released with our 10 years of DST / 20th Anniversary celebration during Klei Fest in June. See you next time!

Don't Starve Together Update 3.37 - 04/16/2026 (PlayStation 4) Everyone's favorite soulless automaton is due for an upgrade to ensure their reign of terror over the innocent organics of the Constant continues. WX-78 Skill Spotlight Highlights - WX-78 Skill Tree added. - WX-78 base Circuit system expanded to 3 bars. - Added several new Circuits. - Now that Year of the Clockwork Knight is over, players will be limited to 2 (or 3 for WX-78) of each type of Clockwork followers at a time. New Skins! “WX-78 Pretty Dark Idolatry Chest” ($5.99usd) This chest contains the WX-78 Pretty Dark Things Chest, and WX-78's complete set of Archaic skin items. New Streaming Drops The “Butterbee" skin for the Beebox has been added to the Chitinous Collection. Check out this post for details. “Mixing honey and butter, who would have thought?” Our Ambassadors have also been given a bunch of new codes to give away. Including Starter Packs, and two new Resurrected skins, the Resurrected All-Chemical Engine and Nightmarish Magician's Chest! Login Reward If you missed it, we added the Pantomimed Backpack as a login reward on April 1st. Just log in to the game to get yours! Roadmap! If you haven't seen it yet, our 2026 roadmap can be found here. And that's it for now! We're finishing up WX-78 and moving on to the Shadow Arc Finale that will be released with our 10 years of DST / 20th Anniversary celebration during Klei Fest in June. See you next time!

This hotfix makes the beta branch have the same revision as the default game up to version 722900 for parity. Changes WX-78's Shadow Servitor perk has been enabled for the beta branch with no changes made to it.
Bug Fixes Fixed a crash when using the skin search filter in the Belongings UI. Fixed Possessed Chassis not eating food correctly.

Everyone's favorite soulless automaton is due for an upgrade to ensure their reign of terror over the innocent organics of the Constant continues. WX-78 Skill Spotlight The WX-78 skill spotlight is now available on Steam. We want to give shadow affinity part of the skill tree a little more time in beta, and we'll hotfix it in as soon as we have it ready for you. We'll need a few more days for console since we need a new build for console that holds off the shadow affinity portion of the tree. We expect this to be released for console on Monday. We apologize for the inconvenience here, but we think it's worth it for us to make sure Shadow Affinity meets our expectations. Highlights - WX-78 Skill Tree added. - WX-78 base Circuit system expanded to 3 bars. - Added several new Circuits. - Now that Year of the Clockwork Knight is over, players will be limited to 2 (or 3 for WX-78) of each type of Clockwork followers at a time. New Skins! “WX-78 Pretty Dark Idolatry Chest” ($5.99 / 12 RMB) This chest contains the WX-78 Pretty Dark Things Chest, and WX-78's complete set of Archaic skin items. New Streaming Drops The “Butterbee" skin for the Beebox has been added to the Chitinous Collection. Check out this post for details. “Mixing honey and butter, who would have thought?” Our Ambassadors have also been given a bunch of new codes to give away. Including Starter Packs, and two new Resurrected skins, the Resurrected All-Chemical Engine and Nightmarish Magician's Chest! Login Reward If you missed it, we added the Pantomimed Backpack as a login reward on April 1st. Just log in to the game to get yours! Roadmap! If you haven't seen it yet, our 2026 roadmap can be found here. And that's it for now! We're finishing up WX-78 and moving on to the Shadow Arc Finale that will be released with our 10 years of DST / 20th Anniversary celebration during Klei Fest in June. See you next time!

Hey guys, just a heads-up regarding tomorrow's update. We're thinking of keeping the Shadow alignment part of the tree locked, so that we can continue working on it in the beta branch. Changes Possessed Chassis Can now detect actions performed by the player spinning. Improved kiting behaviour. Will now try to use max attack range when equipped with a ranged weapon. Nutribrick is now in the Plant Registry Fertilizers tab and can be properly researched. Disabled Shadow Servitor skill while it is undergoing some changes. Disabled Year of the Clockwork Knight. Like chess, each player is now limited to 2 of each type of Clockwork followers at a time. (WX-78’s limit is 3 per type.) Bug Fixes Fixed Possessed Chassis not being immune to electric damage. Fixed Possessed Chassis getting stuck in place using Spin-Cycle until they get dizzy. Fixed Possessed Chassis repeatedly swapping between weapons with the same damage during combat. Fixed being able to revive by haunting a Possessed Chassis. Fixed a case where Incursive Gestalts can get stuck when trying to possess a Chassis. Fixed Possessed Chassis not using the proper animation when attacking with blow darts. Fixed Possessed Chassis stats not being saved when going dormant. Fixed Possessed Chassis not dying when their leader dies.

Changes Fine Motor Control and Right To Modify have been combined into a single skill. Energy-Efficient and Watts Up have been combined into a single skill. Possessed Chassis changes: Added visual FX. Can now hop on and off of boats. Will re-equip a weapon when their currently held weapon breaks. Can be given items to be stored in their inventory. Will switch to the necessary tool to perform an action if it’s within their inventory. Will equip the best weapon based on damage when switching to fight a target. Will now automatically eat food from their own inventory. Boat leaks will now wet items. Added scrapbook entry for Spectral Transfer Module Bug Fixes Fixed an issue where dormant Possessed Chassis may have required the player to travel between Forest/Caves twice for it to reactivate. Fixed Possessed Chassis not being able to use speed modifiers from equipped items. Fixed Possessed Chassis not being able to kite on boats. Fixed Gestalts sometimes getting stuck when trying to possess a Chassis. Fixed a crash that sometimes occurred when kiting with Possessed Chassis. Fixed Spatializer Circuit being under Storage subcategory in the scrapbook.

Changes Updated art on Backup Chassis and Circuit UI based on the Implanted Shadow item. Possessed Chassis changes: Kiting behaviour improved to match the distance of the player to the target. Stops moving when the player is attempting to feed them. Automatically re-equips tools and armor from their inventory when one breaks. NOTE: re-equipping weapons did not make it into this build yet. Reverts to dormant Chassis when the player logs off or travels between Forest/Caves, and automatically reactivates to Possessed Chassis when the player returns. KNOWN ISSUE: If you are playing alone on the server, you may have to travel back and forth between Forest/Caves twice for this to work right now. Added FX to differentiate between regular death vs. sanity depletion. No longer drops inventory upon death. Spectral Transfer Module will drop out once a Gestalt successfully possesses the Chassis, allowing it to be reused. KNOWN ISSUE: Possessed Chassis saved in previous Beta version may not function properly, and may need to be manually removed. Hammers can no longer be used with Spin-Cycle Circuit, only Axes and Pickaxes. Bug Fixes Fixed a bug where WX-78 could be targeted by Enlightened Crown Gestalts spawned by their own Possessed Chassis. Fixed Possessed Chassis being able to equip other character-exclusive items. Fixed Possessed Chassis losing all the inventory from the Backup Chassis. Fixed Possessed Chassis not properly moving when trying to sync with your actions. Fixed a crash when Possessed Chassis enters tree shade. Fixed crashes with Backup Chassis related to socketholder component. Fixed a crash sometimes when Bearger is interrupted during combo attacks. Fixed a crash sometimes when interrupted during spin attack. Fixed slipperiness failing to accumulate while spinning on ice.

Changes Added Lunar and Shadow alignment skills. NOTE: Visual FX will be added later to Chassis affected by Lunar alignment skill. Incursive Gestalts can now be encapsulated. Reduced the cooldowns of Sonic-Invoker Circuit and Blocking Circuit to 20 seconds. WX-78 in the blocking state will now taunt creatures attacking their allies. Reduce Biodata cost in Illumination Circuit to 2 biodata. Reduced Nutribricks fuel value, and raised its farm nutrient value. Spin-Cycle Circuit: All Axes, Pickaxes, and Hammers can now be used, but will recoil when hitting the wrong target. The first swing of the attack is less likely to miss now, unless the target is running away. Added FX to indicate level of dizziness buildup. Stacking Circuits increases dizziness buildup time from 8s to 12s. (Recovery time stays the same.) Changes to tool consumption: Further reduced tool consumption for every target beyond the first, per swing. Stacking Circuits eliminates tool consumption for all targets beyond the first, per swing. (The first target costs one regular usage.) Pick action costs a small fixed amount of usage per swing, regardless of how many targets. Updated Scrapbook to include new Circuits, what creatures to scan for them, and how the Circuitry skills affect them. Controller support for Circuit UI. Bug Fixes Fixed Electrification Circuit’s skill perk damaging walls. Fixed Beanboosters shield regenerating at a rate of 0.07 per second instead of 0.25 per second. Fixed Nutribrick to properly disappear when it spoils. Fixed Shadow Maul lifesteal incorrectly being scaled down when stacking Spin-Cycle Circuits.

Changes Irreplaceable items will no longer go into a Backup Chassis and will fall out when WX-78 Transfers Consciousness. Electrification Circuit direct damage reduction has been reverted. Gastrogain circuits hunger drain changed so the base rate is the same before the skill tree perks. Blocking Circuit Reduced cooldown from 120 seconds to 60 seconds. Increased the damage it can take from 75 to 100. We are considering adding a taunt effect later. Slightly increased Sonic-Invoker Circuit’s panic time. Spin-Cycle circuit The spinning action is now an AOE effect. Added controlled movement while spinning. Movement speed is affected by speed boosts. Spinning for too long will result in a brief dizzy state. Bug Fixes Fixed Backup Chassis created from Inhabited Machines II having a fully charged energy meter. Fixed W.O.B.O.T. picking up just one item at a time and returning to store it. Fixed Electrification Circuit’s skill perk not taking into account electric damage multipliers and wetness. Fixed Electrification Circuit’s skill perk interrupting WX-78’s block state. Fixed Spoiled foods (e.g. Spoiled Meatballs) not giving any stats to a WX-78 with Redigestion Circuit and its skill perk. Fixed WX-78 with Gamma Circuits being unable to dismount from their mount. Modding Notes Added support for more fields in WX-78 module definitions. overridebank, overridebuild, overrideminiuibuild, overrideuibuild

Changes Added 4 Gamma Circuits: Redigestion, Sonic-Invoker, Spin-Cycle, Blocking. Spin-Cycle requires having an Axe equipped to Chop or Attack. Strings will be updated later to make that more apparent. Cooldown indicators for Sonic-Invoker and Blocking Circuits are shown on the expanded Circuit bars. These will be made easier to see later without needing to open the bar. Revised Circuit Tinkering Skill descriptions. All water projectiles (Waterballoons, Ink, Water globs) will now add moisture to items. Circuit tuning: Hardy circuits provide less health overall. Hunger drain benefits with Gastrogain circuits are reduced. The dapper clothing sanity gains from Processing circuits with Alpha Circuit Tinkering II has been reduced. Beanbooster circuit no longer increases the passive health regeneration with Alpha Circuits Tinkering I. Illumination circuits cone light has been adjusted to be smaller overall from Beta Circuit Tinkering II. Electrification Circuit direct damage has been reduced, and the explosion damage from Beta Circuits Tinkering II has been reduced. Bug Fixes Fixed a crash when a Marotter steals an item. Fixed a crash when feeding a Pig Man. Fixed a desync between server and client player movement speed with Vigor Mortis buff and Acceleration Circuits skill perk. Fixed Expansive Storage Unit not functioning properly when transferred into a Backup Chassis. Fixed cases where you could still Move/Drop the Expansive Storage Unit using a controller. Fixed Bright-Beaked Birds still spawning when they’re disabled in world settings. Fixed an issue where corpses could persist, even when there’s no Crystal-Crested Buzzards nearby.

Don't Starve Together Update 1.1.208.0 (Xbox - released April 1, 2026) Changes Added backpack filled to the brim with haute air. Fixes Fixed a crash when searching for certain recipes in the crafting menu. Fixed Gustree Helm trying to hide the player's hair when worn.

Don't Starve Together Update 02.007.002 - 04/01/2026 (PlayStation 5) Changes Added backpack filled to the brim with haute air. Fixes Fixed a crash when searching for certain recipes in the crafting menu. Fixed Gustree Helm trying to hide the player's hair when worn.

Don't Starve Together Update 3.36 - 04/01/2026 (PlayStation 4) Changes Added backpack filled to the brim with haute air. Fixes Fixed a crash when searching for certain recipes in the crafting menu. Fixed Gustree Helm trying to hide the player's hair when worn.

Hey everyone. Small update patch for today. We wanted to give out a backpack filled to the brim with haute air. It is a guarantee that your Survivor will be more visible when using this backpack compared to any other. While we are working hard to get the WX-78 skill tree beta finished for you all to enjoy, we would like to thank everyone who has or still is testing the beta. Your reports and feedback are invaluable. See you next time!

Don't Starve Together: Update 1.27.0 (Nintendo Switch - released March 31, 2026) Changes Shtick Horse will no longer slow you down if you were already faster than its speed boost. Fixes Fixed a crash related to the Deck Of Cards. Fixed networking exploit with tripping while galloping on clients. Fixed world settings incorrectly affecting Nightmare Light and Nightmare Fissure creature spawns. Fixed cases where repaired or previously befriended Clockworks did not follow you sometimes. Fixed Chester, Glommer, Polly Rogers, and others from getting detached from their items when attacked. Fixed bug with Spiders attacking a Chester that is following Webber. Fixed bug related to unlucky players' effects on Hound waves. Fixed bug with Lightning Strikes incorrectly affecting nearby Torches and Morning Stars. Fixed crashes related to Crystal-Crested Buzzard. Fixed art bugs with Glommer's Fairy Glom and Marble Impact Armor skins. Fixed Bishop scrapbook entries showing incorrect damage values. Fixed Gobbler scrapbook entry showing incorrect image.

Hey guys, we've been trying to finish up some of the more tech heavy changes needed, especially with the Spatializer Circuit, to get that out in a hotfix before the weekend. We're still working on the remaining skills, but next week we will also put some focus on retuning the current Circuits. To be honest, it is very likely that we will be adjusting down their effects overall. It may not be a popular change immediately, but we feel some rebalancing is necessary, and the sooner we can get feedback on it the better. Huge thanks to everyone currently in the Beta! Changes Roto-Mapper can now be selected even if it is out of range from WX-78, but can only be sent back to destinations within range. Spatializer Circuit changes: Expansive Storage Unit now stays installed as long as the circuit is plugged in. Can only be opened if the corresponding circuit is powered. Can no longer be moved or dropped. No longer requires the player to be stationary to keep it open. Players may need to Unplug and reinstall their circuits in existing beta save files for these changes to take proper effect. Updated art to help distinguish between Circuit types (Alpha, Beta, etc.) Bug Fixes Fixed bug with Riled Abigail not targeting properly. B.U.D.D.Y. will now tend to nearby farm plants. Fixed a crash with the Illumination Circuits while teleporting in the Sanctum. Fixed WX-78’s Circuit actions not networked properly on clients. Fixed a crash that sometimes happened when unplugging circuits. Fixed night vision improperly updating with the Optoelectronic Circuit and Moggles. Fixed Thermal Circuit steam fx alignment on Backup Chassis and while mounted on a Beefalo. Fixed Backup Chassis highlighting on the Map after swapping to another character. Fixed Circuits showing up as unpowered after Transferring Consciousness in the HUD UI. Fixed W.O.B.O.T., W.I.N.bot, and Woby from trying to store items inside of a Backup Chassis. Fixed a crash with Buzzards attacking. Fixed players saying the wrong phrase when trying to shave Woodie.

Changes Rangebooster Circuit’s skill perk now boosts Bio Scanalyzer’s scanning range. Zaptrocuter recipe is now unlocked directly with the skill, and no longer requires obtaining via Bio Scanalyzer. Backup Chassis will now use the increased energy level from the owning WX-78. Backup Chassis will no longer drop its crafting ingredients when being hammered. Reduced the armor from Hardy Circuit’s skill perk. Roto-Mappers can now be sent over the Abyss in the Caves. Bug Fixes Fixed a crash when Transferring Consciousness when having a Luxury tool or Umbrella equipped. Fixed a crash when haunting a Backup Chassis. Fixed equipped items on the Backup Chassis not dropping when being hammered. Fixed a crash when deactivating a Bio Scanalyzer while it’s dropping bio data. Fixed an issue where the Bio Scanalyzer can become stuck after a successful scan. Fixed WX-78’s circuit bar display being reversed. Fixed WX-78’s current shield not being saved when loading the game. Fixed Charge action for Zaptrocuter Controller or Morning Star failing for WX-78 on clients with prediction. Fixed a crash when Zaptrocuter breaks Marotter Den. Fixed crashing sometimes when interrupted while trying to activate Zaptrocuter. Fixed camera not focused properly after using Zaptrocuter on a Boat. Fixed Catcoonalyzer skin not playing its custom sound effects.

Changes Swapped the Skill Perk effects of the Refrigerant Circuit and Thermal Circuit. Reordered WX-78’s crafting recipes. Reduced WX-78’s base stats to 100 health, 100 hunger, and 100 sanity. Minor adjustments to Zaptrocuter camera and movement acceleration. Zaptrocuter attack button can now be held for repeated attacks. Bug Fixes Fixed Zaptrocuter not responding to held movement controls after firing on clients with prediction. Fixed getting stuck on a black screen sometimes when damaged during transfer to a Backup Chassis. Fixed a crash when food rots in a Backup Chassis, and other item related issues with it. We apologize, but as a side effect of this fix, Backup Chassis saved prior to this hotfix will lose their skins and equipped items. Fixed bug where Beta circuits remained active on Backup Chassis of a player that has left the server. Fixed a crash on closing WX-78’s circuit bar menu. Fixed max health not being properly synced to clients when plugging in the Hardy Circuit. Fixed the Optoelectronic Circuit not functioning properly. Fixed the Beanbooster Circuit instantly healing to full rather than overtime. Fixed Alpha circuits not properly disappearing off the Circuit bar UI when transferring consciousness. Jousting will now be properly interrupted when the weapon is unequipped. Known Issues The action to recharge Zaptrocuter Controller or Morning Star fails for WX-78 on clients with prediction.

Hey everyone, a new beta has just been released! This focus of this beta is the Skill Spotlight for WX-78. Some skills are still marked as "Coming soon", and will be added during this beta. Some mechanics will still go through further tuning, such as creatures lacking behavior to deal with attacks from outside their aggro range. Instructions for accessing the beta branch can be found here. As always, things may be changed or retuned, and we'll be looking forward to your feedback during beta. Notes for Modders The mod release ID for this patch is R41_ST_WX78.
Small hotfix for issues found from the skins. Bug Fixes Fixed a crash when searching for certain recipes in the crafting menu. Fixed Gustree Helm trying to hide the player's hair when worn.
